name: eclipse-s-core
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && echo 'wireshark-common wireshark-common/install-setuid boolean true' | sudo debconf-set-selections && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 openssl curl ca-certificates python3-venv python3-requests clang libclang-dev qemu-system qemu-user-static qemu-utils qemu-efi-aarch64 binfmt-support tcpdump tshark && python3 .devcontainer/install_certs.py && sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/bosch && sudo cp certs/* /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/bosch && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates-java openjdk-17-jre-headless && sudo update-ca-certificates && echo "startup --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStore=/etc/ssl/certs/java/cacerts --host_jvm_args=-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStorePassword=changeit" | sudo tee -a /etc/bazel.bazelrc && curl --proxy http://rb-proxy-de.bosch.com:8080 -fsSL https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y && export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH && rustup target add aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu binutils-aarch64-linux-gnu libc6-arm64-cross libc6-dev-arm64-cross linux-libc-dev-arm64-cross && sudo apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg lsb-release && sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --yes --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu focal stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli || true && sudo curl -L "https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/1.29.2/docker-compose-$(uname -s)-$(uname -m)" -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose || true
